hotels.description_en:
Modern Comforts: The apartment offers sea views, air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and a fully equipped kitchen. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a terrace, and free on-site parking.
Convenient Amenities: The apartment includes a tea and coffee maker, outdoor furniture, and an outdoor dining area. Additional features are a sofa bed, refrigerator, work desk, and free toiletries.
Prime Location: Located in Eilat, the property is 2.7 km from Dekel Beach and 8 km from the Underwater Observatory Park. Nearby attractions include Eilat Botanical Garden and Eilat Promenade.
Explore the Surroundings: Guests can enjoy scuba diving, snorkelling, and other water activities. The Royal Yacht Club is 18 km away, and Aqaba Fort is 18 km from the property.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: The apartment offers a garden, indoor swimming pool, and free WiFi. Family rooms provide ample space for relaxation.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy air-conditioning, balcony, private bathroom, tea and coffee maker, shower, TV, private entrance, dining area, electric kettle, kitchenware, wardrobe. Additional amenities include a kitchenette, kitchen, private pool, pool views, coffee machine, sofa bed, refrigerator, seating area, oven, stovetop.
Convenient Location: Located in Neve Zohar, the apartment is a 3-minute walk from Neve Zohar's Private Beach. Nearby attractions include Masada (23 km), The Botanical Garden in Kibbutz Ein Gedi (37 km), Ein Gedi National Park (39 km), and Ben Gurion Airport (144 km).
